agent_add_default_hint: Click "Add Default Agents" to get started.
agent_discussant_help: These override the global discussant template values for this case only. Stored in
agent_none_configured: No agents configured for this case.
agent_save_first_badge: Save case first to add agents
agent_step_help: Configure which AI agents are available in this case
agent_system_prompt_help: Override the default system prompt for this case
agent_system_prompt_placeholder: Leave empty to use template default...
avatar_step_help: Pick the 3D head, framing, and voice for this case. Empty fields inherit the platform's persona default for the patient's gender.
badge_live_title: {count} active simulation session(s) — edits will be visible to learners on their next request.
bodymap_images_help: Upload custom SVG or PNG images for the body silhouettes. Images should be transparent backgrounds with body outlines.
bodymap_subtitle: Edit body region mappings for physical examination
bodymap_visual_help: Open the interactive editor to drag and adjust body region polygons. Click regions to select them, then drag vertices to reshape.
card_agents_desc: Configure clinical team personas and agent templates.
card_analytics_desc: Review activity, logs, course signals, and learning traces.
card_avatars_desc: Manage visual identities for patients and team roles.
card_bodymap_desc: Edit physical exam body regions and body map assets.
card_cases_desc: Build, review, import, and launch simulation cases.
card_cohorts_desc: Manage courses, enrollment, reports, and registration codes.
card_labdb_desc: Curate lab references, templates, and turnaround behavior.
card_logs_desc: Inspect system, activity, chat, session, and audit logs.
card_medications_desc: Maintain medication catalogues and treatment metadata.
card_notifications_desc: Manage notification preferences and operational alerts.
card_oyon_desc: Configure gaze/emotion capture and student consent surfaces.
card_platform_desc: Control global runtime, defaults, AI, and monitor settings.
card_scenarios_desc: Reusable clinical timelines for case progression.
card_users_desc: Create users, import rosters, and run bulk actions.
card_voice_desc: Tune speech, provider, and voice behavior.
case_code_title: Case code: the case's language + its permanent number
chat_doctor_name_help: This name appears next to user messages in the chat
chat_help: Configure how the doctor appears in patient conversations.
confirm_delete_case: Are you sure you want to delete this case?
confirm_replace_scenario: This will replace the current scenario timeline. Continue?
confirm_replace_timeline: This case already has a scenario timeline ({count, plural, one {# frame} other {# frames}}). Replace it with "{name}"? The current timeline will be lost.
confirm_switch_freeform: Switching to Freeform will clear the structured history fields. Continue?
confirm_switch_structured: Switching to Structured will clear the freeform system prompt. Continue?
confirm_unsaved_save: You have unsaved changes. Save before exiting?
demo_case_language_help: The dialogue language of this case: the patient/agents always reply in it, speech recognition listens in it, and if a voice can't play, the fallback voice for THIS language is used. Fixed once the case is created — changing the UI language never changes how the case behaves.
demo_step_help: EHR-style patient information. Most fields are optional.
empty_no_cases_student: No cases available. Please contact an administrator.
err_base_url_is_key: This looks like an API key — paste it in the API Key field instead.
err_base_url_scheme: Base URL must start with http:// or https://
err_key_is_url: This looks like a URL — paste the API key here, not the endpoint.
err_key_prefix: Expected a key starting with "{prefix}" for {provider}. Double-check this is the right provider's key.
err_llm_bad_key: The API key was rejected. Double-check the key for this provider.
err_llm_model_not_found: The server doesn’t have the model you entered. Click “Detect loaded models” and choose one that’s actually loaded.
err_llm_multiple_models: That server has several models loaded, so it won’t guess which to use. Pick one from the model list (click “Detect loaded models” if it’s empty) and test again.
err_llm_quota: The provider rejected the request for billing reasons — the account is out of quota or credit. Check the plan and billing for this API key.
err_llm_unreachable: Couldn’t reach the server. Check that it’s running and the base URL is correct.
err_max_tokens: Max output tokens must be a positive integer ≤ 200000.
err_temperature: Temperature must be a number between 0 and 2.
header_subtitle_fullpage: Manage cases, cohorts, agents & platform configuration
lab_search_placeholder: Search lab tests (e.g., glucose, hemoglobin, sodium)...
labs_step_help: Configure lab tests with smart search, clinical panel templates, and visual value editors.
llm_config_help: Configure the AI model used for patient simulations. These settings apply to all users.
llm_cost_per_user_help: Max cost each user can incur per day (0 = unlimited)
llm_model_placeholder_optional: Leave empty to use loaded model
llm_platform_cost_help: Max cost for entire platform per day (0 = unlimited)
llm_platform_tokens_help: Max tokens for entire platform per day (0 = unlimited)
llm_provider_desc_lmstudio: Local LLM server — no API key needed
llm_provider_desc_openrouter: Access multiple AI providers via one key
llm_rate_limits_help: Set daily limits for token usage and costs to control API spending. Set to 0 for unlimited (disabled).
llm_service_help: Enable or disable AI functionality for all users
llm_system_prompt_help: Optional. Appended after the case-specific persona/instructions as a trailing reminder. Leave empty to use only the per-case content. (Previously prepended, which shadowed each case persona.)
llm_system_prompt_placeholder: Instructions sent with every conversation (e.g., 'You are a simulated patient...')
llm_tokens_per_user_help: Max tokens each user can use per day (0 = unlimited)
logs_date_filter_note: Date filters live inside each tab now.
monitor_setting_ecg_desc: Show ECG trace and heart rate
monitor_setting_timer_desc: Show elapsed time since session started
monitor_subtitle: Configure which components are visible on the ICU monitor
overview_settings_subtitle: One surface, framed by domain. Existing tabs remain unchanged.
pages_body_placeholder: Body text — anything the AI should know but reveal only on demand.
pages_help: Title + content pairs the AI patient knows about but reveals only when asked. Useful for backstory, social context, lab results the patient already heard, etc.
platform_default_case_help: When students log in, they will see this case pre-selected.
platform_default_case_note: Students will automatically see "{name}" when they log in.
scen_autostart: Auto-start scenario when case loads (otherwise instructor must trigger manually)
scen_choose: Choose a public scenario or a built-in template
scen_duration_note: Patient will progress from initial state to late stage over {minutes} minutes.
scen_step_help: Add automatic deterioration or improvement over time. Choose from quick templates or browse the full repository.
scen_using_repository: Currently using a scenario from the repository
scenario_editing_suffix: — Select a scenario below to apply it
scenario_no_case_help: Create or edit a case to apply scenarios
story_additional_notes_placeholder: Any additional context or instructions for the AI...
story_case_summary_placeholder: Brief summary shown when selecting cases...
story_complete_prompt_help: Full narrative description of the patient case. This is the master instruction for the AI.
story_complete_prompt_placeholder: Write the complete patient story here. Include all relevant medical history, current symptoms, medications, social history, and any other details the AI needs to accurately portray this patient...
story_constraints_help: Rules the AI must follow during the conversation
story_constraints_placeholder: e.g., Only speaks English. Will not reveal drug use unless asked directly. Gets defensive when asked about alcohol.
story_family_placeholder: e.g., Father - MI at 55, Mother - DM, Sister - breast cancer
story_greeting_help: What the patient says when the conversation starts
story_greeting_placeholder: e.g., Doctor, I've had this terrible chest pain since this morning...
story_hpi_placeholder: Describe the onset, location, duration, character, aggravating/alleviating factors, radiation, timing, and severity (OLDCARTS)...
story_ros_placeholder: e.g., Constitutional: fatigue, weight loss. Cardiac: chest pain, palpitations. Respiratory: SOB on exertion
story_social_placeholder: e.g., Smoker 1 PPD x 20 years, occasional alcohol, retired teacher, lives with spouse
story_step_help: Define how the simulated patient behaves and communicates.
title_add_all_group: Add all tests from selected group
title_case_course: Course this case is assigned to
title_case_overrides: Edit per-case overrides (name, availability, response time)
title_edit_persona: Open the underlying persona template in the full editor (system-wide; affects every case using it). You'll return here when done.
title_set_default: Set as default case for students
toast_add_group_failed: Failed to add tests by group
toast_course_assign_failed: Could not update the course assignment.
toast_duplicated: Duplicated "{name}" - Edit and save as new case
toast_enter_case_name: Please enter a case name before saving.
toast_fix_validation: Fix {count, plural, one {# validation error} other {# validation errors}} before saving.
toast_image_too_large: Image too large. Please use an image under 500KB.
toast_models_detected: Found {count} loaded model(s) — pick one below.
toast_no_models_detected: No models are loaded on that server.
toast_save_case_first_agents: Please save the case first before adding agents
toast_scenario_applied_new: Scenario "{name}" applied. Complete your new case details.
toast_select_group: Please select a specific group to add
treatments_step_help: Configure which treatments are expected, contraindicated, or hidden for this case. Assign points for correct treatment decisions and provide feedback for learning.
unsaved_leave: You have unsaved changes. Are you sure you want to leave?
userfield_help: Configure which fields are visible and required on user profiles. Disabled fields will not appear to users.
vitals_alarm_help: Set alarm limits for this case. Leave empty to use system defaults.
vitals_custom_set_note: - These vitals will be applied when case loads
vitals_override_mode_note: - Custom vitals will replace scenario's first frame
vitals_reading_scenario_note: - Values below show scenario's starting vitals
wizard_resumed_suffix: . Save to persist, or discard to revert to the last saved version.
